title: styphelia microphylla
intro: Styphelia microphylla, also known as the Tasmanian button-sedge, is a small shrub native to the southwestern regions of Tasmania, Australia. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Styphelia microphylla include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant properties. Styphelia microphylla can be prepared as a herbal tea or infused oil, allowing for various forms of medicinal use.
